历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 31351 → 47569 → 30633 → 30713 → 30202. In 2022, an abnormal high ranking occurred due to a gap, and after excluding it, recent years have stabilized in the 30200–31300 range, with a baseline of about 30202 in 2025, showing a slight forward trend in the past 3 years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021 → 26 in 2022 → 25 in 2023 → 25 in 2024 → 23 in 2025, decreasing slightly each year. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 34, an expansion of about 47.8% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, significantly easing competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The university ranks 79th in popularity on Douyin platform, rated as 'average', with no notable reputation incidents or abnormal admission records, and a stable public opinion environment. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it did not reach A- or above, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of related engineering majors is stable. In 2026, the total number of Hubei Gaokao registrants is approximately 393,700, slightly higher than 2025 (about 391,200), with an estimated 251,000 Physics Category candidates, slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, down from 437 points in 2024, indicating adjustments in exam difficulty or scoring standards. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Hubei, with general cross-provincial regional preference, and limited appeal to local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 30202, a significant expansion of about 47.8% in 2026 causing a notable backward shift in ranking, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking partially offsetting the expansion effect, and a slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, with minor corrections for ranking rise and candidate increase; the predicted minimum ranking is about 38769, with a range of 38269–39269.

- Traditional Chinese Medicine
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Communication Engineering
- Clinical Medicine
- Polymer Materials and Engineering
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations).

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 38269–39269, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., below 38269), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit, prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
